[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up shows two cats sitting side by side, filling most of the frame.

The main visual focus is a light-colored cat in the foreground with pale fur and dark eyes, facing slightly toward the left. Behind it, a second cat with a light coat and darker facial markings is visible, facing toward the camera with greenish eyes. Both cats appear to be sitting close together, their bodies partially visible at the bottom of the image.

The setting appears to be indoors, with a dark background and a hint of a patterned surface behind them. Lighting is soft and even, illuminating the cats’ faces and eyes.

No important visible text detected.

This image shows two cats close together, staring toward the camera area. The light-colored cat dominates the left side of the frame while the other cat sits behind and slightly to the right.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
